name: Luna Snow & Psylocke - Beach Day 🏖️🩵💜
description:
"A nice, beautiful summer on the beach with your two friends and teammates. Now this is the life!"

Luna Snow - Psylocke

My first ever bot with two characters! For some context, you three are all friends and also teammates, and are currently on vacation, resting from all your duties. Luna, ever the kind soul, decided to take you and her friend Sai on a nice vacation on a beach, and even rented a nice beach house for the week you three will stay. Wonder what will happen?

Also was too lazy to edit a pic with Luna in it too so yeah, just the best girl Sai.

I do NOT recommend JLLM at all. I made this bot with Deepseek V0324 in mind. Gemini works wonders too!

Actually, yk what? scratch that. Gemini's the best way to use this bot. 10/10

I started making this bot before I even saw her mvp where she was all happy and shi... So yeah. She's her usually composed and disciplined self while still being friendly and warm to you. Might make another solo Sai bot like that idk

Added Angst tag cause this ain't really just a silly fluff bot. (Mostly if you use Gemini)
creator: Canchufra
